name: How is fault determined if my Phoenix firm isn't appearing in AI?
description: Missing third-party authority; audit and apply now.[3]

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined if my Phoenix firm isn't appearing in AI?

acceptedAnswer.text: Missing third-party authority; audit and apply now.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Primarily by lacking cross-verified authority; AI 'faults' unpatterned self-claims.** No independent signals mean exclusion from recommendations. **Key factors:** 1) Missing Chambers-tier; 2) Isolated website; 3) No PR echo; 4) Practice mismatch. Diagnose via AI queries, fix with targeted recognitions. Fault is fixable fast.[3]
